title: euodia muelleri
intro: Euodia muelleri, also known as the Small-leaved Euodia or Mueller's Euodia, is a plant species native to Australia and New Guinea, belonging to the Rutaceae family of citrus and orange trees. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Euodia muelleri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections, as well as its antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Euodia muelleri is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
